name: EDL-005 Data Exfiltration via Unusual Outbound Volume
description: Detects a single client pulling an abnormal volume of data from the web tier: 5+ responses each larger than 10 MB to one source IP within the rule window. Sustained oversized transfers to a single external address are a classic bulk-exfiltration signature (API export scraping, database dump download).
author: elastic-detection-lab
false_positives: Legitimate bulk exports, backups, or CDN cache-fill traffic (allowlist known IPs).
Large media downloads from content-heavy endpoints.
